1. I'm excited about the idea of potentially building something in the machine learning space. I've always wanted to work on AI projects and I think this could be a really interesting area to explore. Perhaps it would make sense to start with something small that might be related to my current work, though I'm not sure exactly what that would look like yet. I'm passionate about this area and it could potentially be a great opportunity to learn.

2. This is a great opportunity to maybe explore the mobile development space, which I think could be huge. I've always wanted to build a mobile app and perhaps it would be a good way to learn something new. I think this could be interesting and might be a good use of evenings, though I'm not sure exactly what problem it would solve or whether the scope is right for 8 weeks.

3. I think this could be a great time to perhaps get into open source. I'm passionate about contributing to the community and this is a great opportunity to give back. It might be a good idea to find a project that could potentially align with my interests, though I haven't identified one yet. I've always wanted to be more active in open source but perhaps it would require more time than I have.
